_comment_1: This workflow fetches CDRs from a database and displays them in a dashboard.
name: CDR Dashboard

parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- Identity
  cdr_id,
  domain,
  reseller,

  -- Call basics
  call_direction,
  call_start_datetime,
  call_batch_start_datetime,
  call_batch_sequence_marker,
  call_talking_duration_seconds,
  call_total_duration_seconds,
  call_on_hold_duration_seconds,
  call_disconnect_reason_text,
  call_batch_total_duration_seconds,

  -- Caller info
  call_orig_caller_id,
  call_orig_from_name,
  call_orig_domain,
  call_orig_ip_address,

  -- Called party
  call_term_user,
  call_term_domain,
  call_term_caller_id,

  -- Transfer / forward
  call_through_user,
  call_through_action,
  call_through_domain,

  -- Sentiment & intelligence
  call_intelligence_percent_positive,
  call_intelligence_percent_neutral,
  call_intelligence_percent_negative,
  call_intelligence_topics_top,
  ending_sentiment,

  -- Disposition
  call_disposition,
  call_disposition_reason,
  call_account_code,

  -- ══ FUTURE FEATURE FIELDS ══════════════════════════
  -- Transcription API: GET /domains/{domain}/transcriptions
  -- Required params: id, date (YYYYMM), orig_callid, term_callid
  call_intelligence_job_id,
  call_orig_call_id,
  call_term_call_id,
  prefilled_transcription_api,

  -- Recording API: GET /domains/{domain}/users/{user}/recordings/{callid}
  -- Required params: user (call_term_user), callid (call_orig_call_id)
  -- call_term_user and call_orig_call_id already selected above

  -- SIP Trace
  prefilled_trace_api,
  is_trace_expected

FROM netsapiens_cdrs
WHERE call_batch_start_datetime >= '{{ $json.DATE_FROM }}'
  AND call_batch_start_datetime <= '{{ $json.DATE_TO }}'
ORDER BY call_batch_start_datetime DESC
LIMIT 5000;
